name: compact_clean
description: 緊湊乾淨風格，減少不必要的留白但保持清晰易讀。專為小螢幕和資料密集的通訊場景設計。

styles.body: margin: 0; padding: 12px; background-color: #f5f5f5; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
styles..container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); overflow: hidden;
styles..title: background-color: #4a5568; color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; text-align: left;
styles.th: padding: 10px 8px; text-align: left; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #4a5568; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; font-size: 13px; color: #2d3748; border-bottom: 1px solid #edf2f7; text-align: left; line-height: 1.4;
styles..footer: background-color: #edf2f7; color: #718096; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 11px; text-align: right; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;

warning.description: 需注意、接近閾值、待觀察
